node.text: OpenAI Help Center
Hi Michael, Thank you. I’m attaching a current...
You said:

Subject: Request to restore Codex banked resets that were consumed but not reflected
Hello OpenAI Support,
I’m contacting you about an issue with Codex banked rate-limit resets.
I had Codex banked resets available on my account. I applied a reset, but Codex still showed that I was rate limited and I could not send messages, even in a new Codex chat.
Because the reset did not appear to take effect, I tried applying the reset again. In total, I had to apply the reset 3 times before my Codex usage was finally restored and I was able to send messages again.
I do not have screenshots from the moment this happened, but the issue occurred around:
Date/time: [2026-06-16, JST] Account email: [your email] Plan: [Plus / Pro / other] Codex environment: [Web / Codex app / VS Code extension / CLI] Workspace: [workspace name, if applicable]
From my perspective, the first two resets were consumed but were not reflected in the actual Codex usage/quota enforcement. Only the third reset successfully restored my ability to use Codex.
Could you please check the backend usage/reset logs for my account and restore the banked resets that were consumed but did not take effect?
To be clear, I am not asking for extra resets. I’m asking for the resets that appear to have been consumed without actually restoring my Codex access to be recovered.
Thank you.
The assistant said:
Escalated to a support specialist; You can expect a response in the coming days. Replies will also be sent via email. You can add additional comments to this conversation if needed.
You said:

Additional note:
I would like to clarify that I had to use 3 Codex banked resets before Codex access was restored.
The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but I still could not send messages even in a new Codex chat. Only after the third reset did Codex start working again.
So I am requesting restoration of 2 banked resets that appear to have been consumed without taking effect.
You said:

Thank you. I understand this duplicate case was closed.
I will continue in the existing thread. Here are the details for the original Codex reset issue:
Codex environment: VS Code extension Approximate time on 2026-06-16 JST: around 23:00 JST, give or take. I do not have the exact timestamp. Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace.
Additional context: I used banked Codex rate-limit resets multiple times. The reset appeared to be applied/consumed, but the Codex usage limit did not seem to recover in the chat/usage UI, and I still could not send new Codex requests even in a new chat/session.
This happened for the first two resets. After using a third banked reset, Codex finally became usable again.
Could you please check whether the first two banked resets were consumed without actually restoring usable Codex capacity, and if so, restore or credit back those resets?
You said:

Hello,
I’m following up on this Codex banked reset issue because I have not received a response yet.
The issue is still unresolved from my side. I used 3 Codex banked rate-limit resets before Codex access was restored. The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited and I could not send new requests, even in a new chat/session. Only after the third reset did Codex become usable again.
Could you please check the backend reset/usage logs and confirm whether the first two resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity?
If they were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
Additional details:
- Environment: VS Code extension - Approximate time: 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace - Account email: [your login email] - Plan: [your plan] - Codex extension version: [version, if known] - Error shown at the time: rate-limited / usage limit remained after reset
I understand this may require backend usage/reset log review. Could you please confirm whether this case is still under review and provide an estimated timeline if possible?
Thank you.
You said:

Hello,
I would like to add corrected details for this Codex banked reset issue.
My previous message may have still included placeholders for some fields, so I am providing the actual details below:
- Account email: [enter my actual login email here] - Plan: [enter my actual ChatGPT plan here] - Environment: VS Code extension - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace - Approximate time: 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST - Codex extension version: Unknown - Issue: I used 3 Codex banked rate-limit resets before Codex access was restored. The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited and I could not send new requests, even in a new chat/session. Only after the third reset did Codex become usable again.
Could you please check the backend reset/usage logs for this account and confirm whether the first two banked resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity?
If those first two resets were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
Please also confirm whether this case is still under review by a support specialist.
Thank you.
The assistant said:
Case Number: 10149340
Hi there,
Thank you for reaching out to OpenAI Support.
Banked Codex resets should appear in the Codex app under Settings > Usage once they are available.
Please note that launch seed resets and referral rewards are separate programs, and fulfillment can be asynchronous. Referral-related guidance is available here:
If you still need further help, let us know.
Best, Michael OpenAI Support
You said:

Hi Michael,
Thank you for your reply.
I understand that banked Codex resets should appear under Settings > Usage, and that launch seed resets and referral rewards are separate programs.
However, my issue is not about whether the resets appeared or whether the referral reward was fulfilled.
The resets did appear and I was able to apply them. The issue is that the first two applied resets appeared to be consumed but did not restore usable Codex capacity.
To clarify:
- Case number: 10149340 - Account email: [your login email] - Plan: [your plan] - Environment: VS Code extension - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace - Approximate time: 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST - Issue: I used 3 banked Codex rate-limit resets before Codex became usable again. - The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited and I could not send new requests, including in a new chat/session. - Only after the third reset did Codex access become usable again.
Could you please specifically check the backend reset/usage logs and confirm whether the first two applied banked resets were consumed without actually restoring usable Codex capacity?
If those two resets were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
This is not a question about where resets appear or when referral rewards are fulfilled. I am asking for a backend log review of already-applied resets that appear to have been consumed without restoring access.
If this needs to be handled by a quota, billing, or engineering support team, could you please escalate it to the appropriate team?
Thank you.
The assistant said:
Case Number: 10149340
Hi there,
Thank you for reaching out to OpenAI Support and for the clarification.
We understand that you’re asking us to review whether the first two applied Codex banked resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity, and whether those resets can be credited back.

To continue reviewing this, could you please send us either a screenshot or a short screen recording of what you currently see under Settings > Usage, along with any Codex usage/reset information shown on your end? If you’re still seeing a rate-limit message or any remaining usage-limit issue, please include that as well.
For our reference, please also confirm whether you were actively using Codex within the last 30 days.

While we may be able to review usage information internally, having a reference of what you’re seeing on your side helps us compare the account records against the current UI behavior and better understand what happened.
Please make sure not to include passwords, API keys, secrets, or other sensitive information in any screenshot or recording.
Best, Michael OpenAI Support
You said:

Hi Michael,
Thank you for the follow-up.
I’m unable to attach a screenshot or screen recording from my current support chat interface. I also do not have a screenshot or recording from the exact moment the issue occurred.
However, I can describe what happened and what I currently see on my end.
To confirm your question: Yes, I was actively using Codex within the last 30 days.
Details:
- Case number: 10149340 - Primary environment: Codex app - Approximate time of issue: 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace - Current Codex usage/reset view: [briefly describe what you currently see under Settings > Usage, if available] - Current rate-limit state: I am no longer seeing the original rate-limit message because the third reset eventually restored Codex access.
The issue was temporary/historical. I used 3 banked Codex rate-limit resets before Codex became usable again.
The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited and I could not send new requests, including in a new chat/session. Only after the third reset did Codex access become usable again.
Because I cannot provide the historical screenshot, could you please review the backend reset/usage logs for my account around 2026-06-16 at approximately 23:00 JST and confirm whether the first two applied banked resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity?
If the backend logs confirm that those first two resets were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
If there is another way for me to provide a screenshot or screen recording, please let me know. Otherwise, please proceed with a backend log review based on the timestamp and account information in this case.
Thank you.
You said:

Hi Michael,
Thank you.
I understand that a screenshot or screen recording would help. However, I’m currently unable to attach a screenshot or screen recording through this support interface.
Also, I can no longer show the original rate-limit message because the third banked reset eventually restored Codex access. The issue was temporary/historical, so the failed reset state is no longer visible on my side.
To confirm your question: Yes, I was actively using Codex within the last 30 days.
Current status:
- I am currently able to use Codex again. - I no longer see the original rate-limit message. - I cannot reproduce or show the original failed-reset state because the third reset finally restored access.
Issue summary:
- Case number: 10149340 - Primary environment: Codex app - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace - Approximate time of issue: 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST - I used 3 banked Codex rate-limit resets before Codex became usable again. - The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited. - I could not send new requests even in a new chat/session after the first and second resets. - Only after the third reset did Codex access become usable again.
Because the original rate-limit state is no longer visible and I cannot provide a historical screenshot, could you please review the backend reset/usage logs for my account around 2026-06-16 at approximately 23:00 JST?
Specifically, please check whether the first two applied banked resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity.
If the backend logs confirm that those first two resets were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
Thank you.
The assistant said:
Case Number: 10149340
Hi there,
Thank you for reaching out to OpenAI Support and for confirming that you were actively using Codex within the last 30 days and for explaining what happened.

We understand that the issue was temporary and that you don’t have a screenshot or recording from the exact moment the first two resets appeared to be consumed. Even so, any current screenshot from your interface would still be helpful for our review.

If possible, please send a screenshot of any relevant Codex-related screen you can access now, such as: Settings > Usage Any Codex usage or reset information shown in your account The Codex extension screen in VS Code Any current rate-limit, quota, or usage message, if one appears

Even if the issue cannot be reproduced now, a current screenshot helps our team compare what you’re seeing against the account records and better investigate the reported reset behavior around June 16, 2026 at approximately 23:00 JST.

If the support chat interface does not allow attachments, please try replying to this email thread with the screenshot attached. Please make sure not to include passwords, API keys, secrets, or other sensitive information in the image.
Once we have any available reference from your side, we can continue reviewing the issue.
Best, Michael OpenAI Support
You said:

Hi Michael,
Thank you.
I’m attaching a current screenshot from the Codex app showing the remaining usage information currently visible on my end.
Please note that I can no longer reproduce the original rate-limit message because the third banked reset eventually restored Codex access.
Current status:
- I am currently able to use Codex again. - The screenshot shows the current remaining Codex usage information. - The original issue occurred on 2026-06-16 around 23:00 JST. - I was actively using Codex within the last 30 days. - Primary environment: Codex app. - Workspace: Personal workspace, not a named/team workspace.
Issue summary: I used 3 banked Codex rate-limit resets before Codex became usable again. The first and second resets appeared to be consumed, but Codex still remained rate-limited and I could not send new requests, including in a new chat/session. Only after the third reset did Codex access become usable again.
Could you please compare the attached current screenshot with the backend reset/usage logs around 2026-06-16 at approximately 23:00 JST and check whether the first two applied banked resets were consumed without restoring usable Codex capacity?
If the backend logs confirm that those first two resets were consumed without taking effect, I would like those 2 banked resets to be restored or credited back.
Thank you.
The assistant said:
Case Number: 10149340
Hi there,
Thank you for reaching out to OpenAI Support.
This issue will need to be escalated to our specialist team. They will get back to you directly here and might ask for additional information if needed.
It may take a couple of days for them to get back to you, but, rest assured, your issue will be reviewed and responded to!
Best, Michael OpenAI Support
選択されていません
node.hint: ファイル選択: 選択されていません

node.text: Ask a support question...
Ask a support question...

node.content-desc: メッセージを送信します

node.text: AI support can make mistakes. Your support conversation may be used to improve OpenAI services, including our models, if you have training enabled in Settings.
Learn more

node.content-desc: この接続は保護されています

node.hint: Google で検索または URL を入力
